allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
I: Add Board component

- Create Board.jsx with column headers from project.columns \(default 3\)
- Implement rows from subphases within selected phases
- Add card stacking per cell filtered by subphase + status
- Display row headers with subphase short names \(1.1, 1.2, etc.\)
- Implement collapsible phase headers as section dividers
- Add empty state for cells with no cards
- Enable horizontal scrolling for wide boards
- Wire up Electron IPC handlers for database operations
- Expose database API through preload.js
- Update App.jsx to load projects from database
- Connect CurrentProjectPage to Board component
- Add import script for LOTR project JSON
- Include LOTR YouTube project sample data \(7 phases, 17 subphases, 45 cards\)
- Add electron-rebuild dependency for native module compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
K: Fix Tailwind CSS v4 PostCSS configuration

- Install @tailwindcss/postcss package for Tailwind v4 compatibility
- Update postcss.config.js to use @tailwindcss/postcss instead of tailwindcss directly
- Remove debug logging from main.js and App.jsx
- Clean up test files

This fixes the blank renderer issue caused by PostCSS plugin incompatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
